calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Oct-10-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerks: P. Dias/J. Stokes; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The court grants decree changing name to Aidan S. Robson. Decree signed.
